result.summary: Clarity AI exposes a REST API at `https://api.clarity.ai/clarity/v1` authenticated via a user-generated API key/secret exchanged at `/oauth/token`, plus a known MCP server at `https://clarity-sfdr20-mcp.pro.clarity.ai/mcp` with undetermined auth.
result.description: Clarity AI provides extra-financial intelligence and sustainability data products for financial institutions and other organizations. Its platform covers areas such as climate, ESG risk, EU taxonomy, SFDR, portfolio analytics, widgets, and data feeds.

clarity_api_key_secret.label: Clarity AI API key and secret pair
clarity_api_key_secret.setup: Sign in to [go.clarity.ai](https://go.clarity.ai), then go to **My Account → Account preferences** and click **Generate API key**. Give it a label and generate the pair, then copy both the `key` and `secret`. If the option is missing, API access is not enabled for your account and the docs say to contact your account manager. See [Getting API Tokens](https://developer.clarity.ai/docs/getting-api-tokens-access-and-authentication).
